memberdef.argsstring: (char *buf, size_t size, size_t pos, char c)
memberdef.name: write_char

briefdescription.para: Write a single char to the output buffer.

simplesect.para: New position (may exceed size if truncated).

memberdef.argsstring: (char *buf, size_t size, size_t pos, const char *s)
memberdef.name: write_str

briefdescription.para: Write a null-terminated string to the output buffer.
Format an unsigned integer to decimal string.
Format a signed integer to decimal string.

memberdef.argsstring: (char *buf, size_t size, uint32_t val, uint8_t min_digits)
memberdef.name: syn_fmt_hex

memberdef.argsstring: (char *buf, size_t size, int32_t q16_val, uint8_t frac_digits)
memberdef.name: syn_fmt_q16

memberdef.argsstring: (char *buf, size_t size, const uint8_t *data, size_t len)
memberdef.name: syn_fmt_hexdump

briefdescription.para: Format a hex dump of a byte array.

detaileddescription.para: Output: "DE AD BE EF" (space-separated hex bytes).

memberdef.argsstring: (char *buf, size_t size, int32_t val, uint8_t places)
memberdef.name: syn_fmt_fixed

briefdescription.para: Format a value with a fixed number of decimal places.

parameterdescription.para: Number of decimal places from the right.

memberdef.argsstring: (char *buf, size_t size, const char *const *parts, size_t n)
memberdef.name: syn_fmt_concat

briefdescription.para: Build a string from parts (like snprintf but simpler).

detaileddescription.para: Concatenate up to n string fragments into buf.

briefdescription.para: Lightweight formatting — no libc printf dependency.
